Class User

java.lang.Object
model.User
Direct Known Subclasses:
AdminStaff, EntertainmentProvider, Student
public abstract class User extends Object
Abstract base class representing a user of the university events app.

All user types (Student, AdminStaff, EntertainmentProvider) extend this class and inherit common authentication fields such as email and password.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      protected User(String email, String password)
      Constructs a new User with the given credentials.
      Parameters:
      email - the user's email address; must not be null or empty
      password - the user's password; must not be null or empty

    • checkPassword

      public boolean checkPassword(String passwordAttempt)
      Checks whether the given password matches this user's stored password.
      Parameters:
      passwordAttempt - the password to check
      Returns:
      true if the passwords match, false otherwise

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the user.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a descriptive string including the user's email
